ddls:
CREATE TABLE "migration_records" (
  "migration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each migration record */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* ISO country code of the migration record */,
  "origin_node_id" INTEGER /* ID of the origin node */,
  "destination_node_id" INTEGER /* ID of the destination node */,
  "origin_longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the origin point */,
  "origin_latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the origin point */,
  "destination_longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the destination point */,
  "destination_latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the destination point */,
  "migration_period" TEXT /* Period of migration (e.g., year, month) */,
  "number_of_migrants" REAL /* Number of migrants */,
  "migration_version" INTEGER /* Version number of the migration record */,
  "migration_status" TEXT /* Status of the migration record (e.g., active, archived) */,
  "source_data_id" TEXT /* ID of the source data (e.g., survey ID, dataset ID) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("migration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_migration_records_origin_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("origin_node_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_migration_records_destination_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("destination_node_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_migration_records_country_code FOREIGN KEY ("country_code") REFERENCES countries ("country_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_migration_records_migration_period FOREIGN KEY ("migration_period") REFERENCES migration_periods ("period_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_code" TEXT /* ISO country code */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the country */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the country */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the country */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "nodes" (
  "node_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each node */,
  "node_name" TEXT /* Name of the node (region or city) */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* ISO country code of the node */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the node */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the node */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the node */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the node */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the node */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the node */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "migration_periods" (
  "period_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each migration period */,
  "period_name" TEXT /* Name of the migration period (e.g., 2023-01) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the migration period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the migration period */,
  "period_status" TEXT /* Status of the migration period (e.g., open, closed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "migration_reasons" (
  "reason_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each migration reason */,
  "reason_name" TEXT /* Name of the migration reason (e.g., Economic, Political) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the migration reason */,
  "parent_reason_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent reason (for hierarchical reasons) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reason_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "migration_reasons_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record-link */,
  "migration_id" INTEGER /* ID of the migration record */,
  "reason_id" INTEGER /* ID of the migration reason */,
  "reason_weight" REAL /* Weight or importance of the reason for the migration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_migration_reasons_records_reason_id FOREIGN KEY ("reason_id") REFERENCES migration_reasons ("reason_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_migration_reasons_records_migration_id FOREIGN KEY ("migration_id") REFERENCES migration_records ("migration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographic_data" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "migration_id" INTEGER /* ID of the migration record */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the migrant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the migrant */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the migrant */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the migrant */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the migrant */,
  "family_size" INTEGER /* Size of the migrant's family */,
  "language_spoken" TEXT /* Primary language spoken by the migrant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_migration_id FOREIGN KEY ("migration_id") REFERENCES migration_records ("migration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* ISO country code of the indicator */,
  "node_id" INTEGER /* ID of the node (if applicable) */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the economic indicator (e.g., GDP, Unemployment Rate) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the economic indicator */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year of the indicator */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the economic indicator data */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the economic indicator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_indicators_country_code FOREIGN KEY ("country_code") REFERENCES countries ("country_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_indicators_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("node_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "political_stability" (
  "stability_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each political stability metric */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* ISO country code of the stability metric */,
  "node_id" INTEGER /* ID of the node (if applicable) */,
  "stability_metric" TEXT /* Name of the political stability metric (e.g., Corruption Perception Index, Rule of Law) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the political stability metric */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year of the stability metric */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the political stability metric data */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the political stability metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stability_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_political_stability_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("node_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_political_stability_country_code FOREIGN KEY ("country_code") REFERENCES countries ("country_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "migration_id" INTEGER /* ID of the migration record */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user accessing the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_migration_id FOREIGN KEY ("migration_id") REFERENCES migration_records ("migration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
